abilities.name: Arcane Conflux
abilities.text: Once per activation. Friendly models within 6" may draw range and LoS for (t) actions from this model. These actions receive a (+).

abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

abilities.name: Tempting Fate
abilities.text: Once per game. When a friendly master is killed, this model may drain two (soulstone). If it does so, deal 4 irreducible damage to this model, then the friendly master heals 4.

actions.name: Raging Gore
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (+) if it was generated by the Charge action.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

actions.name: Arcane Rush
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Enemy models within range must discard a card or be moved 3" directly away. Models moved by this action must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Overwhelming Energy
triggers.text: Another friendly model within range gains a Hastened token.

triggers.name: Seeing Red
triggers.text: This model declares the Charge action, ignoring restrictions.
